items.title: OpenAI’s cozy partner Cerebras is on track for a blockbuster IPO
items.summary: AI chip maker Cerebras is heading for a blockbuster IPO that could value it at $26.6 billion or more. It's relationship with OpenAI is deep and rich.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
